reviews.comment:
Groso parador, limpio, completo. Cuenta con mesas y bancos al sol ideal para hacer un almuerzo o parada. Tbien tiene juegos de plaza para niños. La comida es fresca y a precios razonables. Muy burno

(Translated by Google)
Great roadside inn, clean and well-equipped. It has tables and benches in the sun, ideal for lunch or a break. It also has a children's playground. The food is fresh and reasonably priced. Very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhaUxpWG1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención,  pocas ganas de trabajar de los empleados y....va poca gente!!! Señores de ACA, como socio cerraría esta estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, employees lack motivation, and... few customers! ACA representatives, as a member, I would close this gas station.
